info.name: BX Finance — BFF API
info.description:
Direct calls to the BX Finance BFF (banking_api_server). Covers new endpoints added in phases 29-34 that have no coverage in the existing token exchange collections.

Use BANKING_API_BASE_URL in the shared BX-Finance environment.

Most endpoints require an active session cookie. Run a login flow first (PKCE via the BX Finance UI or Step-by-Step collection), then re-use cookies in Postman.

request.description:
BFF proxy to MCP server /audit. Returns recent MCP tool-call audit events.

Query params:
- agentId: filter by agent
- operation: filter by tool name
- eventType: tool_call | auth_challenge | consent_request | session
- outcome: success | failure | challenge
- limit: max 200, default 50

Returns empty events array when MCP server is unreachable.

Added Phase 34.

Returns current token exchange mode.

Response: { mode: '1-exchange' | '2-exchange' }

- 1-exchange: Single RFC 8693 token exchange (user token -> MCP token)
- 2-exchange: Chained delegation (user token -> agent actor token + Exchange 1, then MCP actor token + Exchange 2)

RFC 9728 protected resource metadata for the BFF. Returns JSON-LD metadata describing the BFF as a protected resource.

Response includes:
- resource: BFF resource identifier URI
- resource_indicators: scopes and audiences the BFF accepts
- scopes_supported: list of supported OAuth scopes
- authorization_servers: PingOne AS discovery URL
- bearer_methods_supported: ["header"]

No authentication required. Used by OAuth clients to discover what the BFF requires.

Invokes an MCP tool via the BFF inspector proxy. Requires MCP server running at {{MCP_SERVER_URL}}.

Body:
- toolName: name of the MCP tool to invoke
- args: tool-specific arguments object
- token: (optional) bearer token to pass to MCP server

Available tools (from MCP server discovery):
- get_account_balance: args { accountType: 'checking'|'savings'|'all' }
- get_transaction_history: args { accountType, limit? }
- get_sensitive_account_details: requires {{BANKING_SENSITIVE_SCOPE}} (banking:sensitive:read) in bearer token

Session cookie required for authenticated invocations.
